channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: DisaBench: A Participatory Evaluation Framework for Disability Harms in Language Models
item.description: arXiv:2605.12702v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: General-purpose safety benchmarks for large language models do not adequately evaluate disability-related harms. We introduce DisaBench: a taxonomy of twelve disability harm categories co-created with people with disabilities and red teaming experts, ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, release, prompt, large language model, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: excel-mcp-server - A Model Context Protocol server for Excel file manipulation
item.description: A Model Context Protocol server for Excel file manipulation<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns

item.title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
